examples: But it is all rather reminiscent of Ethelred the Unready, an 11th-century king of England who paid Danegeld to buy off Viking invaders.
Once you pay off the Danes for not raiding the country they might come back next year and demand more Danegeld for not raiding it again.
What's unfair is that we make it tough for young people to get a job unless they pay danegeld to a four-year college to get a certificate that says it's okay to employ them.
